items.title: Stock Market Today: Dow, Nasdaq Fall, Set Aside Trump-China Tariff Move; Tesla Clears Entry But This AI Stock Craters
items.description: The Dow Jones index fell despite President Trump making a China tariff move. Tesla cleared an entry on the stock market today. AMC surged but an AI stock cratered.

items.title: Manitowoc Q2 Earnings Miss Estimates, Revenues Decline 4% Y/Y
items.description: MTW posts weaker Q2 results as EPS and revenues miss estimates, though orders grew and the gross margin moved up.

items.title: Deere: A Single Miss Could Crash The Party
items.description: Deere shines on beating low expectations, but weak farm income and margin pressures limit upside. Read this article to know why I rate DE stock as Sell.
